deliveryUnits.name: Retail Banking Operations
deliveryUnits.description: Owns the internal developer platform, infrastructure, and shared services that underpin all product delivery.

releaseTrains.name: Core Banking ART
releaseTrains.description: Responsible for cloud infrastructure, networking, and security foundations.

squads.name: Account Services
squads.description: Manages cloud provisioning, cost optimisation, and reliability.

squads.name: Fraud Controls
squads.description: Oversees platform security controls, vulnerability management, and audit readiness.

squads.name: Payments Routing
squads.description: Owns network topology, DNS, load balancing, and connectivity between services.

releaseTrains.name: Digital Channels ART
releaseTrains.description: Builds tooling and workflows that improve engineering velocity across all product teams.

squads.name: Card Processing
squads.description: Maintains and evolves the continuous integration and deployment pipeline infrastructure.

squads.name: Ledger & Reconciliation
squads.description: Owns internal CLIs, SDKs, code generation tools, and local development environments.

keyResults.title: Reduce payment incident rate
keyResults.notes: Focus on top 3 recurring root causes.

keyResults.title: Achieve monthly availability
keyResults.notes: Requires resilience work across card and clearing paths.

keyResults.title: Reduce lead time for change
keyResults.notes: Prioritize trunk-based flow and test stability.

keyResults.title: Automate release checks
keyResults.notes: Expand quality gates in CI pipelines.

deliveryUnits.name: Customer Banking
deliveryUnits.description: Delivers the end-user facing product suite including payments, onboarding, and the customer portal.

releaseTrains.name: Payments ART
releaseTrains.description: End-to-end payment processing, fraud detection, and financial reconciliation.

squads.name: Payments Core
squads.description: Processes transactions, manages payment gateways, and handles reconciliation.

squads.name: Fraud & Risk
squads.description: Real-time fraud detection, risk scoring, and chargeback management.

releaseTrains.name: Lending & Onboarding ART
releaseTrains.description: Owns the customer portal, onboarding flows, and all user-facing web and mobile surfaces.

squads.name: Mortgage Journey
squads.description: Builds and maintains the customer-facing web application and design system.

squads.name: Mobile Banking
squads.description: Develops the iOS and Android customer applications.

squads.name: KYC & Onboarding
squads.description: Owns the new customer registration, KYC, and account activation journeys.

keyResults.title: Increase approved applications
keyResults.notes: Improve credit model explainability and offer fit.

keyResults.title: Reduce onboarding drop-off
keyResults.notes: Simplify KYC and reduce document friction.

keyResults.title: Improve NPS
keyResults.notes: Address clarity of loan terms and status updates.
